steps.title: Use dilation property
steps.content: A dilation changes side lengths but preserves angle measures. Since triangle $ABC$ is dilated to triangle $XYZ$, corresponding angles are equal.

steps.title: Match corresponding angles
steps.content: Angle $A$ corresponds to angle $X$, and the diagram shows angle $A$ as $60^\circ$. Therefore angle $X$ also measures $60^\circ$. The answer is C.
